+--[  Authentication  ]--+
|                        |
|   +---------+          |
|   |  Login  |          |
|   +----+----+          |
|        |               |
|        v               |
| +------------+         |
| |  Validate  |         |
| +------+-----+         |
+--------|---------------+
         |
+--[  Processing  ]---+
|        v            |
|   +---------+       |
|   |  Parse  |       |
|   +----+----+       |
|        |            |
|        v            |
|  +-----------+      |
|  |  Execute  |      |
|  +-----------+      |
+---------------------+
